title: T-019 — SCN-011b PIN First-time Setup wizard (2-step) (06-a)
prompt:
# T-019 — SCN-011b PIN First-time Setup

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-003b, §6 D8
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:240-249 §3.3
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:58-112 (label pin_screen, reused for setup)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver the forced first-time PIN setup wizard — 2-step Set/Confirm — invoked when scanner_pin_hash is null after login. Reuses the SCN-011 6-dot+numpad pattern with a 2-step indicator and a top info banner.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/setup/page.tsx` renders 2-step wizard with steps indicator.
2. Step 1 'Ustaw PIN' captures new_pin; Step 2 'Potwierdź PIN' must equal step 1.
3. Server Action calls POST /api/scanner/pin/setup (T-008); on policy-violation server response, render inline error 'PIN nie spełnia wymagań bezpieczeństwa.'.
4. Top info banner: 'PIN jest wymagany do szybkiego logowania na hali. Zapamiętaj go — nie możesz go zresetować samodzielnie.'
5. Success ⇒ router.push('/scanner/site-select').

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/setup/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/setup/setup-form.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/setup/setup.action.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-011b-pin-setup.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the wizard renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:58-112` (pin_screen reused) plus the §3.3 UX spec, then it has a 2-step indicator above the same 6-dot+numpad pattern, the info banner above the steps, and a 'Wróć' back button — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given step 1 captured PIN '264719' and step 2 captured '264720', when the user taps confirm, then an inline error 'PIN-y nie pasują' is shown and the wizard returns to step 2 with cleared dots
3. Given a step-2-confirmed PIN that fails server policy (e.g. '111111' with forbid_repeating=true), when POST /pin/setup responds 400 SC_PIN_POLICY_VIOLATION, then the wizard renders the inline message 'PIN nie spełnia wymagań bezpieczeństwa.' and returns to step 1

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-011b-pin-setup.test.tsx asserting parity + mismatch handling + policy-violation handling before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-011b-pin-setup'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow entering the wizard if scanner_pin_hash already exists
- Do not log either entered PIN value
- Do not auto-advance past step 2 without server confirmation

pipeline_inputs.description: Forced first-time PIN setup 2-step wizard reusing SCN-011 numpad with steps indicator + info banner.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) 2-step indicator above the 6-dot+numpad block.
2) Info banner with mandatory copy at top.
3) 'Wróć' back button retained.
4) Mismatch between step 1 and step 2 shows inline error and resets step 2.
5) Server policy violation returns user to step 1 with inline error.
6) Success redirects to /scanner/site-select.
out_of_scope: Do not implement self-service PIN change here (T-020)
Do not implement admin reset (desktop 02-SETTINGS owns it)
acceptance_criteria: Given the wizard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:58-112 reused for setup + UX §3.3, then it has the 2-step indicator, info banner, same 6-dot+numpad pattern and 'Wróć' button — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given step 1 PIN '264719' and step 2 '264720', when confirm is tapped, then inline error 'PIN-y nie pasują' is shown and step 2 dots reset
Given step-2 PIN '111111' rejected by server with SC_PIN_POLICY_VIOLATION, when response arrives, then the wizard shows 'PIN nie spełnia wymagań bezpieczeństwa.' and returns to step 1
test_strategy: RED: write scn-011b-pin-setup.test.tsx asserting parity + mismatch + policy-violation paths before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not allow entry if scanner_pin_hash already exists
Do not log entered PIN values
Do not auto-advance without server confirmation
